seoTitle: Timor vs Timor West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Timor and Timor West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Timor vs Timor West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Timor and Timor West.
heading: Timor vs Timor West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Timor, Victoria and Timor West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Timor West has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Timor (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Timor or Timor West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Timor has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Timor West scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Timor scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Timor West scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Timor or Timor West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Timor West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
